title: Discovery: Suppress Data Migration Feature and Defer UX Redesign
description: Suppress the Data Migration feature from the UI in the near term. There has been no significant uptake or interest in it. The backend services should be retained, but the frontend will not be re-created for now. Major UX revisions are needed before resurfacing the feature. Keep in backlog for future consideration.
acceptance_criteria: Data Migration feature is hidden from the UI
Backend migration services remain intact and functional
Feature is tracked in backlog for future UX redesign
ux_changes: Hide Data Migration feature from the UI. Backend services remain available.
implementation_notes: This is a discovery/decision ticket. No implementation yet. The feature should be suppressed from navigation and any entry points in the UI.
